questionHtml:
A probe launched from a spacecraft moves towards the event horizon of a black hole.

State what is meant by the event horizon of a black hole.
markschemeHtml: the distance from the black hole at which the escape speed is the speed of light ✔

meta.title: State what is meant by the event horizon of a black hole.
